questions.question: Describe the difference between the forward and inverse problems in image restoration. Provide an example of each problem.
questions.hint: Use diagrams or flowcharts to illustrate your answer

questions.question: A noisy image of a person is given as input to the filter (2D Wiener filter) for image restoration. What are the assumptions made by the filter, and how do they impact the restored image?
questions.hint: Refer to the 2D Wiener filter equation and its assumptions

questions.question: Explain the concept of the maximum a posteriori (MAP) estimator in the context of image restoration. How does it differ from the maximum likelihood (ML) estimator?
questions.hint: Use the MAP estimator equation and compare it with the ML estimator equation
